case_title: WENDEL, ALLISON VS INNER CIRCLE EXT. II DBA RUBY SKYE. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WENDEL, ALLISON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INNER CIRCLE EXT. II DBA RUBY SKYE. $355.62 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $405.62, DEFT'S NAME IS AMENDED TO INNER CIRCLE EXT. II DBA RUBY SKYE. DEFTS GEORGE & LINDA CARPETTI ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-25-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-08-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CAN NOT BE IN COURT ON THIS DATE.
